scope.notes: PG mockup review and approval viewer applet; lint enabled in Phase 6 ship (covers am_mockup_review.py + vellum_approval/ package)

bible_coverage_matrix.bible_area: Registered app inventory and source scope
bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Manifest paths are resolved and readable source files are counted.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Does not prove those files are the entire app surface.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Uses the same pg_design_lint engine as the commit gate for enabled repo paths.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Files outside pg_design_lint scope remain unproven and must not be reported as pass.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Finds buttons/actions and nearby handler or feedback markers.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Static heuristics cannot prove runtime click behavior for complex Qt or delegated handlers.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Finds high-risk visible controls whose text-entry, visual, launch, or state path is disconnected.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Static heuristics cannot prove full runtime workflows; app-specific browser and tray probes remain required for final proof.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Runs a Playwright browser probe against BA controls with visible status/timestamp feedback.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Currently covers the BA HTML applet only.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Imports PAH Inspector findings for endpoint, mailbox, ledger, protocol, and UI wiring evidence.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Does not cover non-PAH apps until dedicated runtime adapters exist.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Verifies mandatory truth markers, no legacy fake all-app tokens, totals consistency, and timestamps.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Only proves BA's report contract, not target app behavior.

bible_coverage_matrix.bible_area: Screenshot overlap, clipping, and visual regression
bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: No BA visual regression scanner exists yet.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Screen glitches require Playwright/PySide screenshot probes and image comparison before BA can gate them.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: No cross-app PySide click harness exists yet.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Qt button feedback remains static or manually verified until an app-specific runtime adapter exists.

bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Checks declared HTML order markers and reports unproven PySide source order as a coverage gap.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Does not prove pixel geometry; PySide surfaces need runtime probes or explicit metadata.

bible_coverage_matrix.bible_area: BA browser runtime geometry and screen-glitch proof
bible_coverage_matrix.evidence: Runs Playwright geometry probes against Bible Audit at 1920x1080 and 1000x900, saving screenshot artifacts.
bible_coverage_matrix.gap: Covers Bible Audit only; no non-BA runtime geometry adapters or screenshot baseline diffing yet.
